inputs.label: Property Price
inputs.businessContext: Total purchase price of the multi-unit property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total purchase price of the multi-unit property.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çok birimli mülkün toplam satın alma fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix d'achat total de la propriété multi-logements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio total de compra de la propiedad de múltiples unidades.

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Cash amount paid upfront (typically 20% of property price).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cash amount paid upfront (typically 20% of property price).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Peşin ödenen nakit miktarı (genellikle mülk fiyatının %20'si).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahlung in bar (in der Regel 20 % des Immobilienpreises).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant en espèces versé initialement (généralement 20% du prix de la propriété).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de efectivo pagada por adelantado (típicamente 20% del precio de la propiedad).

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du prêt hypothécaire en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del préstamo hipotecario en años.

inputs.label: Monthly Rental Income
inputs.businessContext: Gross monthly rental income from all rented units before vacancy and expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross monthly rental income from all rented units before vacancy and expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm kiralanan birimlerden boşluk ve giderler öncesi brüt aylık kira geliri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bruttomonatsmieteinnahmen aller vermieteten Einheiten vor Leerstand und Ausgaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu locatif brut mensuel de toutes les unités louées avant vacance et dépenses.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso mensual bruto por alquiler de todas las unidades alquiladas antes de desocupación y gastos.

inputs.label: Monthly Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly costs including property taxes, insurance, maintenance, property management, and other expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly costs including property taxes, insurance, maintenance, property management, and other expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak vergisi, sigorta, bakım, mülk yönetimi ve diğer giderler dahil toplam aylık maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Gesamtkosten inklusive Grundsteuern, Versicherung, Instandhaltung, Immobilienverwaltung und sonstiger Ausgaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts mensuels totaux incluant taxes foncières, assurance, entretien, gestion immobilière et autres dépenses.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos mensuales totales que incluyen impuestos a la propiedad, seguros, mantenimiento, administración de la propiedad y otros gastos.

inputs.label: Vacancy Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of time the rental units are vacant.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of time the rental units are vacant.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiralık birimlerin boş olması beklenen yüzde oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Prozentsatz der Zeit, in der die Mieteinheiten leer stehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage attendu de temps où les unités locatives sont vacantes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de tiempo que las unidades de alquiler están desocupadas.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
